title: SkillsLock
description: Per-framework artifact integrity ledger — spec §2181-2216 (M07 Stage B; ADR-0014). One `skills.lock` at the framework root maps `name@version` → a lock entry recording the artifact's SRI content hash, its import source, the install timestamp, the user tier at install, and the L1-L5 validation report id. The runtime recomputes the content hash on every artifact load and blocks the load with an `artifact_hash_mismatch` event on drift (spec §2214). The file is checked into the user's framework repo alongside the framework JSON (spec §2216); canonical (sorted-key, stable-field-order) serialization makes two installs of the same set byte-identical for reproducible cross-machine installs (spec §2204). v0.1 import sources are URL or local file only (MVP §M7 — Anthropic-upstream search + its `source_commit` trust chain is the v1.0 layer, deliberately out of scope here).

version.description: Lock-format version. Pinned to 1 for v0.1; a format change is a major schema bump (new schemas/skills-lock.v2.json + ADR) per schemas/README.md versioning policy.

installed.description: Map of `name@version` → lock entry. The key name `installed` is the spec §2200 contract (the lock is a user-VCS-committed artifact; the wire key is durable). Serialized with sorted keys for reproducibility (spec §2204).

LockEntry.title: LockEntry
LockEntry.description: One installed artifact's integrity + provenance record (spec §2201-2209).

installed_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the artifact was installed.

ArtifactKind.title: ArtifactKind
ArtifactKind.description: The artifact primitive this entry locks. `mcp_server` is the M06 MCP Manager install target. Per gotcha #43 (typify-friendly extraction): enum extracted to $defs with title.

TierAtInstall.title: TierAtInstall
TierAtInstall.description: User tier (spec §8.security L4 / §0d) at the moment the artifact was installed — surfaced so a reviewer can see whether a promoted-tier-only artifact entered the framework while promoted. Two-tier v0.1 per §0d. Per gotcha #43.

ValidationReportId.title: ValidationReportId
ValidationReportId.description: Identifier of the L1-L5 validation report produced at install time (spec §2207 + Phase 8 §8.security). Non-empty. Per gotcha #43 (validated inline string extracted to $defs with title).

Source.title: Source
Source.description: Where the artifact was imported from. v0.1 supports URL import (capability-gated GitHub-raw / HTTPS fetch) and local-file import only (MVP §M7). Discriminated by the `type` field per gotcha #26 (struct-shape variants required for serde(tag)).

SourceUrl.title: SourceUrl
SourceUrl.description: The import URL (GitHub raw / HTTPS). Per gotcha #43 (validated inline string inside a oneOf variant extracted to $defs with title or typify panics).

SourcePath.title: SourcePath
SourcePath.description: The local file path the artifact was imported from. Per gotcha #43 (validated inline string inside a oneOf variant extracted to $defs with title).

SriHash.title: SriHash
SriHash.description: SRI-style algorithm-prefixed base64 SHA-256 digest of the canonical artifact bytes: `sha256-<standard-base64>`. The `sha256-` prefix makes the algorithm self-describing and swappable without a schema break (npm/SRI convention; ADR-0014). The pattern enforces the prefix at the schema level so a bare hex digest (the spec §2205 sketch's `sha256:<hex>` form) fails validation — ADR-0014 deliberately tightened this.
